description: System for Cross-domain Identity Management (SCIM) configuration. SCIM can be configured with a LDAP or a Verify Identity Access User Registry (WebSEAL runtime component) server connection. SCIM allows administrators to create and manage users, as well as provide attributes to other Verify Identity Access authentication components.

admin_group.description: The name of the administrator group. Used to determine if the authenticated user is an administrator.

schemas.description: List of managed schema to modify

enable_header_authentication.description: Whether or not SCIM header authentication is enabled.

enable_authz_filter.description: Whether or not the authorization filter is enabled.

max_user_response.description: The maximum number of entries that can be returned from a single call to the /User endpoint.

AttributeMode.description: Customized attribute access modes for a SCIM schema.

modes.description: An array of customised attribute modes for the schema.

Mode.description: Access mode for a specific attribute.

subattribute.description: For a multivalued attribute - the second level SCIM attribute name.

uri.description: Name of schema properties to modify.

properties.description: Schema unique properties to apply. The structure depends on the schema URI.

ldap_connection.description: The name of the ldap server connection.

ldap_object_classes.description: The list of ldap object classes that are used to indicate a user object.

search_suffix.description: The suffix from which searches will commence in the LDAP server.

user_suffix.description: The suffix that will house any users that are created through the SCIM interface.

user_dn.description: The LDAP attribute that will be used to construct the user DN. Defaults to cn.

connection_type.description: Indicates the type of ldap server connection type.

attrs_dir.description: The name of a federated directory used to generate the list of available ldap object classes and ldap attribute names. Only valid if the connection_type is set to isamruntime.

enforce_password_policy.description: Set this field to true if SCIM needs to honour the backend password policy when changing a user password.

user_id.description: The LDAP attribute that will be used as the user ID. Defaults to uid.

mappings.description: The list of SCIM attribute mappings.
The list of SCIM enterprise user attribute mappings.

ldap_object_classes.description: The list of ldap object classes that are used to indicate a group object.

group_dn.description: The LDAP attribute that will be used to construct the group DN.

ldap_connection.description: The name of the ldap server connection to the Verify Identity Access user registry. If a connection is not specified the SCIM application will not attempt to manage Verify Identity Access users.

isam_domain.description: The name of the Verify Identity Access domain. This will default to Default

update_native_users.description: Enable update of Verify Identity Access specific attributes when LDAP standard attributes are updated.

connection_type.description: Indicates the type of ldap server connection ldap or isamruntime.

attrs_dir.description: The name of a federated directory used to generate the list of available ldap object classes and ldap attribute names. Only valid if the connection_type is set to isamruntime.

enforce_password_policy.description: Set this field to true if SCIM needs to honour the backend password policy when changing a user password.

name.description: The name of the ldap object class type that is used to indicate a user or group object.

SCIMMapping.description: Mapping between SCIM attributes and backend attributes.

scim_attribute.description: The name of the SCIM attribute being mapped.

mapping.description: For a simple SCIM attribute - the mapping for this attribute. For a complex SCIM attribute this can be an array of mappings.

oneOf.description: Single mapping for simple SCIM attribute
Array of mappings for complex SCIM attribute

type.description: The type of attribute to map to the SCIM attribute.

source.description: The attribute to map to the SCIM attribute.

scim_subattribute.description: For a multivalued attribute - the second level SCIM attribute name to be mapped. eg. work or home for SCIM attribute email.
